UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user account on the 'मोनेटाइजेशन' platform, including their profile information, social connections, and monetization status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

name.description: The display name of the user.

email.description: The user's email address, used for login (e.g., Google Login).

phone.description: The user's phone number, used for login (e.g., Mobile OTP Login).

profilePhotoUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

bio.description: A short biographical description provided by the user.

followerIds.description: An array of UserProfile IDs that follow this user. (Relationship: UserProfile N:N UserProfile)

followingIds.description: An array of UserProfile IDs that this user is following. (Relationship: UserProfile N:N UserProfile)

followerCount.description: The total number of followers this user has. (Denormalized count)

monetizationEnabled.boolean: Indicates if the user has met the criteria (e.g., 1000 followers) and is enabled for monetization.

isAdmin.description: Flag indicating if this user has administrative privileges.

isBlocked.description: Flag indicating if this user has been blocked by an administrator.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

Post.title: Post
Post.description: Represents a photo post made by a user on the platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Post entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who created this post. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Post)

photoUrl.description: URL to the photo content of the post.

description.description: A detailed description or caption for the post.

likeIds.description: An array of UserProfile IDs who have liked this post. (Relationship: UserProfile N:N Post)

commentIds.description: An array of Comment IDs associated with this post. (Relationship: Post 1:N Comment)

isFeatured.description: Indicates if the post has been set as a 'Top Featured Post' by an administrator.

isModerated.description: Flag indicating if the post has undergone content moderation (e.g., by AI or admin).

moderationStatus.description: The current moderation status of the post (e.g., 'pending', 'approved', 'rejected', 'flagged').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the post was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the post was last updated.

Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: Represents a comment made by a user on a specific post.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Comment entity.

postId.description: Reference to the Post this comment belongs to. (Relationship: Post 1:N Comment)

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who made this comment. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Comment)

content.description: The text content of the comment.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the comment was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the comment was last updated.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Represents a notification sent to a user about social interactions or system events.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Notification entity.

recipientId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who is the recipient of this notification. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Notification)

senderId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who triggered this notification (e.g., followed, liked, commented). Optional for system notifications. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Notification)

relatedPostId.description: Reference to the Post entity related to this notification (if applicable). (Relationship: Post 1:N Notification)

relatedCommentId.description: Reference to the Comment entity related to this notification (if applicable). (Relationship: Comment 1:N Notification)

isRead.description: Indicates if the recipient has viewed this notification.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the notification was created.

AppSetting.title: AppSetting
AppSetting.description: A singleton entity to store global application settings and configurations, managed by an administrator.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AppSetting entity. This should be a fixed value like 'global_settings' as it's a singleton.

adsenseCodeHtml.description: The HTML code provided by Google AdSense to be embedded in the website for displaying ads.

featuredPostId.description: Reference to the ID of the Post currently set as 'Top Featured' on the homepage. (Relationship: Post 1:1 AppSetting)

privacyPolicyContent.description: The full content of the privacy policy, typically in HTML or Markdown format, displayed on the legal page.

termsAndConditionsContent.description: The full content of the terms and conditions, typically in HTML or Markdown format, displayed on the legal page.

disclaimerContent.description: The full content of the disclaimer, typically in HTML or Markdown format, displayed on the legal page.

contactEmail.description: The official email address for contact inquiries.

contactPhone.description: The official phone number for contact inquiries.

aboutUsContent.description: The content for the 'About Us' page, describing the platform's purpose and system.

aiModerationEnabled.description: A flag to enable or disable the AI-powered content moderation tool globally.

minFollowersForMonetization.description: The minimum number of followers a user needs to activate monetization.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the application settings were last updated.
